content.text:
```mdl
@ NON‑NEGOTIABLE CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON‑DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
@ Transportation Challenge 2017
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_9_nda_18

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standard library imports (implicit in most environments)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
open std.collections
open std.strings

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties (Vendor and BPS)
type Party = Vendor | BPS

@ Individual person (could be employee, representative, etc.)
type Person = {
    name: string,
    role: string               # e.g., "employee", "representative"
}

@ Vendor (Receiving Party)
type Vendor = {
    name: string,
    employees: List<Person>,
    # Indicates whether the Vendor has ever solicited a BPS representative.
    # This field is used only for the “no‑solicitation” prohibition.
    has_solicited_bps_rep: bool
}

@ Boston Public Schools (Disclosing Party)
type BPS = {
    name: string,
    representatives: List<Person>
}

@ Confidential information that is exchanged under the Agreement
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    routing_data: string,      # abstract placeholder for the data set
    protected: bool            # must be true for any data that is covered
}

@ Secure database used by the Vendor to store ConfidentialInfo
type Database = {
    stored_info: List<ConfidentialInfo>,
    # Security controls required by the Agreement (all must be true)
    encryption_at_rest: bool,
    encryption_in_transit: bool,
    access_control: bool,
    audit_logging: bool,
    firewall_enabled: bool,
    anti_virus_installed: bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – the public objects that will be aligned across modules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The Vendor (Receiving Party)
entity vendor: Vendor

@ The Boston Public Schools (Disclosing Party)
entity bps: BPS

@ The secure database maintained by the Vendor
entity database: Database

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper Functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Checks whether a given Person is a BPS representative
func is_bps_rep(person: Person, bps: BPS) -> bool:
    list.contains(bps.representatives, person)

@ Checks whether the Vendor has ever solicited a specific Person
func vendor_solicited(v: Vendor, p: Person) -> bool:
    v.has_solicited_bps_rep and is_bps_rep(p, bps)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic requirements extracted from the Agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ 1. Confidentiality – Vendor must keep all ConfidentialInfo protected
rule O vendor_protects_confidential_info:
    forall info in database.stored_info:
        info.protected always

@ 2. Security Controls – the Database must implement all required safeguards
rule O database_security_controls:
    database.encryption_at_rest and
    database.encryption_in_transit and
    database.access_control and
    database.audit_logging and
    database.firewall_enabled and
    database.anti_virus_installed always

@ 3. Nondisclosure – Vendor may use ConfidentialInfo only for the Challenge
rule O vendor_use_limited_to_challenge:
    forall info in database.stored_info:
        info.protected implies true always   # placeholder – actual purpose check is external

@ 4. Return/Destruction – Vendor must return or destroy all ConfidentialInfo on request
rule F vendor_return_or_destroy_on_request:
    (forall info in database.stored_info:
        info.protected) implies
        (info in database.stored_info = false) always

@ 5. Publication – Vendor may not publish any material without BPS consent
rule F vendor_no_unauthorized_publication:
    not (exists info in database.stored_info:
            info.protected and
            /* publication flag would be modeled as a separate field;
               here we treat any protected info as non‑publishable */
            true) always

@ 6. Immediate Notice – Vendor must promptly notify BPS of any breach
rule O vendor_immediate_breach_notice:
    /* The model does not capture time‑stamped events; the rule asserts
       that a breach flag, if ever true, must be accompanied by a notice
       flag that is true at the same step. */
    forall breach in database.stored_info:
        (/* breach detected */ false) implies
        (/* notice sent */ false) always

@ 7. No Solicitation of BPS Representatives – Prohibition (hypothesis)
rule F vendor_no_solicitation_of_bps_representatives:
    not vendor.has_solicited_bps_rep always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
